archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Dark Mode with Pixel Art Accents)
design_philosophy: A modern, high-contrast dashboard-meets-marketing site. It must feel like a competitive trading terminal mixed with a premium Minecraft server. Strictly avoid generic purple/teal gradients. Use sharp edges, pixel art accents for nostalgia, and clear data visualization for the economy aspect.

body.usage: General body text. Must remain highly readable.

monospace_and_stats.usage: IP addresses, market prices, leaderboards, player balances.

accents.usage: Small overlines, badges, rank names, or subtle Minecraft-style pixel accents. Use sparingly.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Strict grids for the market data to ensure scanability.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use Mode B: 'Control Room' grid for the market and player dashboard. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) with highly utilized space.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px crisp solid borders for cards (border-border). No soft blurry shadows. Rely on border contrast.
spacing_and_layout.radius: Minimal. Use rounded-sm or rounded-md (max 8px) to keep a sharp, tech/gaming edge.

buttons.primary: Solid #10B981 background, black text, font-bold, hover state slightly darker. Crisp edges.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px border #2A2E35, white text, hover:bg-#1A1D24

cards.market_item: Bento style. Background #121418, 1px border #2A2E35. Contains Recharts/Shadcn charts for structure market curves.
cards.leaderboard_row: Flat, compact padding (p-4), hover:-translate-y-1 transition, subtle border on bottom.

hero.ip_copier: Massive monospace block for 'mine.farm-and.fr'. Must include an interactive copy button with a pixelated hover effect or icon.

navigation.style: Solid Dark header with a crisp bottom border (#2A2E35) works best to separate it from the content.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Translate-y-1 for cards. Buttons should have an immediate color snap or a slight scale effect.
motion_and_interactions.charts: Market curves must use animated stroke drawing on load (Recharts).
motion_and_interactions.ip_copy: When IP is copied, show a brief success state (e.g., green checkmark, text changes to 'Copié !').

pages_and_features.accueil: Hero with server IP 'mine.farm-and.fr' (copy to clipboard). Background uses the futuristic blocks image. Quick stats below (Players online, Market Volume).
pages_and_features.marche_des_structures: Bento grid of structures. Each card shows current price, historical curve (green if up, red if down).
pages_and_features.classement_joueurs: Top earners leaderboard. Clean data table or list format. Use monospace font for numbers.
pages_and_features.vote: Dedicated page to implement voting sites. Include a list of voting platforms and rewards. Pixel art icons for rewards.
pages_and_features.dashboard_joueur: Requires login (Pseudo Minecraft + MDP). Shows personal earnings, owned structures, and portfolio value chart.

media_and_icons.icons_library: lucide-react for standard UI. Can use custom pixel SVGs for specific Minecraft items if needed.

images.description: Futuristic digital landscape with illuminated blocks, perfectly fits the modern Minecraft economy vibe.
Abstract neon green grid for subtle background elements behind market charts.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text, especially green/red market indicators, meet WCAG AA over dark backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements (Vote buttons, Copy IP, Login form, Market items) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'copy-ip-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn components for complex UI (tables, charts, tabs) but strip their generic look. Apply the sharp, border-heavy dark theme. Use Recharts via Shadcn for the market curves. Ensure the copy-to-clipboard IP feature is robust. Keep the UI language in French.
